summary: Joel Spolsky announces his sabbatical after leaving Juno Online Services and previews his plans to write about software development. He outlines topics he intends to cover, including team management, motivation, and software business strategy. This brief post serves as the founding entry of what would become one of the most influential programming blogs.
key_points: Joel left Juno Online Services and is taking a sabbatical to travel, learn, and recharge
He plans to write articles covering software team management, motivation, and business strategy
This post marks the beginning of the 'Joel on Software' blog
money_quotes: Since then I've been traveling, learning, and resting up for the next big thing.
key_insight: This brief inaugural post planted the seed for what would become one of the most influential software development blogs, signaling Joel's intent to share hard-won insights on managing developers and building software companies.
